channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Deshaun Watson's season is ended by a ruptured Achilles tendon, Browns say QB will have surgery
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Deshaun Watson won't finish the season as Cleveland's starting quarterback for the second straight year. He's injured again, and the Browns have new problems.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump criticizes 'ugly' new NFL kickoff rule
item.description: "I hated seeing what the NFL did with the kickoff return,” Trump posted Sunday night on Truth Social.
item.dc:creator: Joanne Haner, NewsNation

item.title: Raiders QB Aidan O'Connell expected to be out 4-6 weeks with a broken thumb, AP source says
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — Las Vegas Raiders quarterback Aidan O'Connell is expected to be out four to six weeks with a broken thumb, a person close to the situation said Monday. The person spoke to The Associated Press on condition of anonymity because the Raiders have not made an announcement.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas fans must use better discretion after SEC fine for debris thrown on field, Sarkisian says
item.description: Texas coach Steve Sarkisian said the No. 5 Longhorns have a “passionate fanbase” that needs to use “better discretion” after the school was fined and threatened with further sanctions by the Southeastern Conference over fans throwing water bottles and trash on the field during a loss to No.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vertuno, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Patriots head coach Jerod Mayo calls team 'soft' amid six-game losing streak
item.description: New England Patriots head coach Jerod Mayo called his team "soft" following their sixth consecutive defeat, against the Jacksonville Jaguars in London.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WNBA champion, Bay Area native shattered records in latest series
item.description: (KRON) – The New York Liberty officially won a WNBA Championship after defeating the Minnesota Lynx in a nail-biting Game 5 (67-62). Liberty point guard and Miramonte High School alum Sabrina Ionescu won her first chip with multiple accolades.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: LeBron James calls out 'lame' Browns fans who booed Deshaun Watson following injury
item.description: LeBron James called out Cleveland Browns fans for booing injured quarterback Deshaun Watson, saying they were "lame" on a social media post.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas fined $250K for trash thrown onto field, must ID and ban fans
item.description: The SEC said it won't suspend alcohol sales at Texas events, but "reserves the right to do so if other requirements are not met.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, NewsNation

item.title: USF downs UAB, 35-25, outscoring Blazers 28-6 down the stretch
item.description: TAMPA (usf) - Returning to Raymond James Stadium for the first time in three weeks, South Florida (3-4; 1-2 American) outscored UAB 28-6 down the stretch to notch its first American Athletic Conference win of the season, 35-25, over the Blazers (1-6; 0-4 American) on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, USF, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Judge who presided over Michael Jordan's father's murder trial files petition for release of convicted killer
item.description: The judge who presided over the murder trial of Michael Jordan's father has filed a petition to a parole commission, saying he wants the convicted killer released.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Russell Wilson throws for 2 TDs, runs for another TD in Pittsburgh debut as Steelers rout Jets 37-15
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Russell Wilson sat at the podium, uniform still on, in no rush to move on from a moment he believed would always come. Even as the weeks passed and his aching calf struggled to get better. Even as Justin Fields deftly guided the Pittsburgh Steelers in his place.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Angel Reese sits courtside at WNBA Finals with split Lynx/Liberty outfit
item.description: Chicago Sky rookie Angel Reese took in the WNBA Finals from Brooklyn on Sunday night, donning a split Lynx-Liberty shirt during the decisive Game 5.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers fear Brandon Aiyuk suffering season-ending ACL tear in loss to Chiefs
item.description: The San Francisco 49ers are fearing star receivier Brandon Aiyuk has suffered a torn ACL after being carted off against the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS and advance to face Yankees in World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ohtani heads to World Series for first time, achieving goal he had when signing with Dodgers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani got what he came for when he decided to sign with the Los Angeles Dodgers: a trip to the World Series. “I really feel like we finally arrived.
item.dc:creator: DOUG PADILLA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees and Dodgers meet in World Series for 12th time in matchup of Broadway and Hollywood
item.description: New York neighbors who became cross-country rivals, the New York Yankees and Los Angeles Dodgers are renewing their starry struggle in the World Series for the first time in 43 years.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Donald Trump leads raucous ‘U-S-A!’ chant from suite at Steelers-Jets game
item.description: Donald Trump touched down in Pittsburgh to watch the Steelers take on the New York Jets, and fans went ballistic with "U-S-A!" chants when he was spotted at Acrisure Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Everything is warmups for the New York Yankees until they get to the World Series
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — For the New York Yankees, the real opening day is World Series Game 1. A little bubbly for a playoff berth, the AL East, the Division Series and their 41st pennant were just warmups.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pennsylvania high school football team dominates opponent despite having just 11 players
item.description: It's common for football teams to seek out as much depth as possible for its roster, but a high school football team was uniquely shorthanded during a recent game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CMU def. New Mexico Highlands 21-10 in homecoming game
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—In the second quarter, with the game tied at zero, the Cowboys sought to break the deadlock. Joey Cave handed the ball off to Mike Jones, who found space after strong blocking from his teammates.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Kyle Larson opens the third round of NASCAR's playoffs as the title favorite
item.description: Kyle Larson has been lucky of late in Las Vegas, where he opens the third round of NASCAR's playoffs on top of the Cup Series standings and the favorite to win Sunday's race.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Alonso and Mets extend season again, beating Dodgers 12-6 to send NLCS back to LA for Game 6
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Not easy to knock out these New York Mets. Pete Alonso golfed an early three-run homer and the Mets hammered an ineffective Jack Flaherty, extending the National League Championship Series with a 12-6 victory over the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 5 on Friday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Guardians starting Tanner Bibee in Game 5 against Yankees after short outing earlier in ALCS
item.description: Tanner Bibee is getting a second crack at the Yankees in the AL Championship Series. His first one didn't go so well. The right-hander will start for the Cleveland Guardians in Game 5 on Saturday after he was pulled from Game 2 in the second inning by manager Stephen Vogt.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: GJ Tigers soccer downs Central, inches closer to league title
item.description: In a big southwestern league soccer showdown at Community Hospital Unity Field, the Grand Junction Tigers stayed hot.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Las Vegas Strip stadium, resort detailed in county documents; new Athletics ballpark revealed
item.description: Extensive details have been revealed about the proposed $1.5 billion "multi-purpose, enclosed ballpark" on the Las Vegas Strip that could become home to the Las Vegas Athletics MLB franchise in time for the 2028 baseball season.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, ABC 4

item.title: Illinois teen deemed ineligible for cross-country race after charity 5K
item.description: “I don’t really think there’s any reason that running a charity 5K should get me disqualified for running cross-country meets,” freshman Cole Deering said.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Bernthal, NewsNation

item.title: Bills acquire wide receiver Amari Cooper from Browns, giving QB Josh Allen a much-needed playmaker
item.description: Amari Cooper went from a fading No. 1 wide receiver in Cleveland to a top one with Buffalo. Looking to add a playmaker for quarterback Josh Allen, the Bills acquired Cooper on Tuesday in a trade with the skidding Browns, whose season seems to be unraveling by the week with the NFL’s worst offense.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW and TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Nevada says volleyball match will go on despite players' forfeiture
item.description: The Nevada women's volleyball team players announced they would forfeit the game against San Jose State.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Column: Caleb Williams has arrived and the Bears are a playoff team
item.description: Caleb Williams has shown impressive improvement in his first six games with the Chicago Bears, leading the team to three straight wins and a potential playoff berth.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
